query: SELECT COLUMN_NAME, COLUMN_TYPE, DATA_TYPE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'baseline_schedules' ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;
command: mysql --batch --raw --column-names --default-character-set=utf8mb4 --host gateway02.us-east-1.prod.aws.tidbcloud.com --port 4000 --user 3xenzgJ3NGNThF2.96bc46f6ec2f --database 9n2ukZGVgWAjZMdS2ZS3BU --execute SELECT COLUMN_NAME, COLUMN_TYPE, DATA_TYPE FROM INFORMATION_SCHEMA.COLUMNS WHERE TABLE_NAME = 'baseline_schedules' ORDER BY ORDINAL_POSITION;
